name: Ease of Use
description: Refers to the intuitiveness and simplicity of the app's interface and features, allowing users to quickly create collages without a steep learning curve.

name: Template Variety
description: The number and diversity of pre-designed templates available within the app, catering to different styles and occasions.

name: Customization Options
description: The extent to which users can personalize their collages, including adjusting layouts, adding text, stickers, backgrounds, and filters.

name: Photo Editing Features
description: The availability and quality of built-in photo editing tools, such as cropping, rotating, color adjustments, and special effects.

name: Social Sharing Integration
description: The ease with which users can share their collages on social media platforms directly from the app.

name: Watermark
description: Whether the free version of the app adds a watermark to the created collages.

name: Ads
description: The frequency and intrusiveness of advertisements displayed within the app.

name: Cost
description: The pricing model of the app, including whether it is free, offers in-app purchases, or requires a subscription.

name: User Ratings & Reviews
description: The average rating and the general sentiment expressed in user reviews on app stores.

name: Advanced Features
description: Availability of features like AI-powered editing, video collage creation, and object removal.

description: The ability to directly share collages to social media platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, and others.

name: Free vs. Paid Features
description: The balance between features available in the free version and those locked behind a premium subscription, affecting accessibility for casual users.

name: AI-Powered Features
description: The incorporation of AI-driven tools like automatic collage generation, smart layouts, object removal, and AI filters to streamline the collage creation process.

name: Ease of Use
description: The app's interface and features should be intuitive and easy to navigate, even for users with limited experience in photo editing.

name: Variety of Templates and Layouts
description: The app should offer a diverse selection of pre-designed templates and customizable layouts to suit different collage styles and photo arrangements.

name: Editing Tools
description: The app should provide a range of editing tools, such as filters, cropping, text options, stickers, and background customization, to enhance the visual appeal of collages.

name: Social Media Integration
description: The app should allow users to easily share their collages on various social media platforms, such as Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter.

name: Customization Options
description: The app should offer a high degree of customization, allowing users to adjust border sizes, colors, aspect ratios, and other design elements to create unique collages.

name: Performance and Stability
description: The app should be stable and perform smoothly without crashing or lagging, even when working with large numbers of photos or high-resolution images.

name: Cost and Availability
description: The app should be affordable (preferably free with optional in-app purchases) and readily available on both iOS and Android platforms.

name: User Ratings and Reviews
description: Reflects user satisfaction and app quality, influencing app store rankings and credibility.

name: Download Velocity
description: Measures the speed at which the app gains new downloads, indicating popularity and relevance.
